programme.desc: Táthar ag athrú spóirt do Underdogs TG4 agus anois beifear ag tabhairt aghaidh ar Shacar na mBan! (The goalposts have shifted for TG4 Underdogs as they tackle Women's Soccer!)

programme.title: France 24
programme.desc: Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Bréidín & Clúmh
programme.desc: Déanann Bréidín pitseámaí olla do Chlúmh, ach is mó suim atá ag Clúmh sa bpáipéar beartán. (Tweedy makes a woolly onesie for Fluff but he's far more interested in the wrapping!)

programme.title: Na Singalings
programme.desc: Is iomaí sin rud a chloisfí sa gcoill! (There are lots of different sounds in the woods!)

programme.title: Bíp Bíp Cory Carson Speisialta
programme.desc: Bíonn Cory ag súil go mór am a chaitheamh lena dhlúthchara Freddie ag an campa Samhraidh. (Cory is excited to spend lots of time with his Best Friend Freddie at Camp Friendship.)

programme.title: Abby's Amazing Adventure
programme.desc: Beidh Abby agus Rudy ina ngrúmaeirí madraí inniu. (Abby and Rudy are dog groomers today.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Éiríonn le Posy éacht a dhéanamh le linn cluiche Superball ach ní fheiceann aon duine í. (During a game of Superball, Posy makes an amazing catch that no one else sees.)

programme.title: Olobob Top
programme.desc: Bíonn Bobble ag déanamh aithrise ar gach uile dhuine go dtí go dtosaíonn Fobble ag déanamh aithrise air féin! (Bobble won't stop playing the 'copying game'.)

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Dúisíonn an Ninja Oíche dragan. An gcuirfidh seisean na laochra de dhroim seoil? (Night Ninja steals an ancient gong to awaken a real Dragon!)

programme.title: Wussywat
programme.desc: Ceapann Nín go bhfuil a cuid cnaipí caillte aice ach tá bealach ag Wussywat len iad a fháil ar ais. (Ird thinks her buttons are lost forever.)

programme.title: Zou
programme.desc: Beidh tuilleadh eachtraí ag Zou agus a chairde inniu. (Zou and his friends have more adventures today.)

programme.title: Dinocity
programme.desc: Tugann cairde Ricky cead a chinn dó na cluichí ar fad don lá a roghnú. (Ricky is happy when his friends agree to allow him to pick all the games for the day.)

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Tá Mealbhacán Uisceasár Óg sáinnithe ar an trá. (A young Watermelonsuchus gets beached during a heatwave.)

programme.title: Dot
programme.desc: Tá Dot agus a cairde ag díol sláthach le hairgead a bhailiú don chlub cispheile. (Dot and her friends try to raise funds for their basketball league by selling homemade slime.)

programme.title: Ella Bella Bingo
programme.desc: Aimsíonn Ella agus Henry capall adhmaid agus glaonn siad Trup Trup air. (Ella and Henry find a wooden horse in the garden while playing and they call it Trup Trup.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Charlie agus Lola
programme.desc: Tá Charlie agus Lola ag súil go mór le seó puipéad. (Charlie and Lola are looking forward to a Chinese puppet show.)

programme.title: Baile Beag Draíochtúil Pinocchio
programme.desc: Aimsíonn na cairde frog... nó an prionsa dathúil é i ndáiríre? (The friends find a frog... or is he a handsome prince?)

programme.title: Pat an Madra
programme.desc: Tá Caipín i ngreim ag Norbert agus caithfidh Pat teacht i gcabhair air. (Norbert catches Hoodie, so Pat has to rescue him from the pound.)

programme.title: Angelo Rules
programme.desc: Tá Angelo ag dul ag campáil sa ghairdín cúil. (Angelo decides to camp in the back garden.)

programme.title: Dónall Dána
programme.desc: Tá fadhb ó thaobh slándála ag Club na Láimhe Láidre. (The Purple Hand gang is having a security problem.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Super Simple Amhráin
programme.desc: Amhrán spraíúil faoi shiorcín óg a bheidh inniu againn. (A fun song about a Baby Shark.)

programme.title: Blocuimhreacha
programme.desc: Is breá le hOcht Déag luas. (We meet Eighteen and learn that he loves speed.)

programme.title: Blocdhathanna
programme.desc: Caithfidh na Dathanna iad féin a eagrú ar roth mór inniu! (Today, the Colours have to organise themselves on a big wheel!)

programme.title: Na Blociontais
programme.desc: Tá sé ag cinneadh ar na Trí Bhéar caisleáin ghainimh a thógáil! (The Three Bears are having trouble building sandcastles!)

programme.title: Fíricí Fíochmhara
programme.desc: Beidh muid ag foghlaim faoi eilifintí sa zú inniu. (Today at the zoo, we're learning facts about elephants with songs and fun.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Tugann Posy ceann dá pictiúir do Pip. (Posy gives Pip one of her paintings.)

programme.title: Saol Faoi Shráid
programme.desc: Cé atá ag salú na háite? Níl Glibín sásta ar chor ar bith. (Glibín wants to find out who's throwing rubbish everywhere.)

programme.title: Bígí ag Ceol
programme.desc: Daltaí Scoil Lorcáin i mBaile Manach a rachaidh i mbun pinn an tseachtain seo chun amhrán a chumadh faoi bháid. (Music series for children presented by John Sharpson.)

programme.title: Curious George
programme.desc: Tá George ag iarraidh a bheith ina chleasghleacaí. (George realises that there's nothing he wants more in life than to be an acrobat.)

programme.title: Nuair a Bheidh Mé Mór
programme.desc: Samhlaíonn Ruarc an cineál saoil a bheidh aige ina theagascóir spóirt uisce nuair a bheidh sé mór. (Ruarc imagines his life as a water sport instructor when he grows up.)

programme.title: Zou
programme.desc: Tá deacrachtaí ag Zou lena thionscadal ealaíne. (Zou has some difficulty with his art project today.)

programme.title: Dee Dee
programme.desc: Tá DeeDee ag iarraidh an seomra suí a athmhaisiú ach ní thuigeann Nino cén fáth. (Nino can't understand why DeeDee wants to redecorate her sitting room.)

programme.title: Is Mise
programme.desc: Tógann Seoirse caisleán gainimh ar an trá. (Seoirse goes to the beach and makes a sandcastle.)

programme.title: Ainmhithe Craiceáilte
programme.desc: I measc na n-ainmhithe a bheidh ar Ainmhithe Craiceáilte an lae inniu beidh cat mífhoighneach agus nathair ag cadhcáil. (Today we'll see toasted cats and kayaking snakes.)

programme.title: Comhrá
programme.desc: Mártan Ó Ciardha iar-Eagraí Spóirt RTÉ Raidió na Gaeltachta a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín. Mártan Ó Ciardha, veteran sports journalist from Cois Fharraige is this week's guest.

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Réitíonn Lois amach í féin tar éis di droch léirmheas ó dhuine de na custaiméirí. (Lois gets dolled up after a scathing customer review.)

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Bíonn béile ag Diane le máthair Frasier, an síceolaí cáiliúil. (Diane shares a very pleasant dinner with Frasier's famous psychologist mother.)

programme.title: Geantraí
programme.desc: Beidh an grúpa Monks of the Screw, Eoghan agus Flaithri Neff agus Seán Ó Sé ar an gclár. (Traditional music from Cork and Kerry. Presented by Eibhlín de Paor.)

programme.title: Murder She Wrote
programme.desc: Fágann milliúnaí an chuid is mó d'eastát ag a mhadra agus ní mó ná sásta atá a chlann faoi. (A millionaire dies and leaves most of his estate to a dog.)

programme.title: Domhan an Dúlra
programme.desc: Lig do dhomhan na bhfia-chat tú a chur faoi dhraíocht. (Allow yourself to be amazed by the world of wild cats.)

programme.title: Grand Tours of Scotland's Lochs
programme.desc: Tugann Paul aghaidh ar chuid de na lochanna gar de Meadhan na h-Alba sa gclár seo. (Paul explores some lochs close to Scotland's densely populated Central Belt.)

programme.title: Glór Tíre - Rogha & Togha
programme.desc: Beidh scoth an cheoil tíre ar an gclár seo le John McNicholl agus Colleen Gormley, as Doire. (This show features the best of Irish Country music.)

programme.title: The Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Tá sé ag goilleadh ar Lorelai go bhfuil Rory mór le Richard agus le Emily. When Richard and Rory form an instant bond during a wonderful day of golf, Lorelai feels left out.
